content = open\('E:/Job-req/job-req-system/src/components/layout/header/Header.js', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)

old = '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tclassName={`header_right_info d-none ${\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t!headerType || headerType === 6 || headerType === 9\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t? "d-md-inline-flex"\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t: "d-lg-inline-flex"\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}`}\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t>'

new = '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tclassName="header_right_info d-none"\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t>'
